title: Engineering onboarding friction
summary: Multiple teams report new hires taking 2+ weeks to ship first PR due to scattered docs, broken local setup scripts, and unclear ownership of the dev environment playbook.

title: Webhook reliability under load
summary: Customer success highlighted recurring P1s: webhook delivery delays and drops during peak traffic; root cause often traced to retry policy gaps and missing dead-letter visibility.

title: API documentation accuracy
summary: Sales and solutions engineers cite outdated API examples and missing error codes as a top reason for longer implementation cycles and evaluation risk.
